requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection for BESS — Lesotho 220/380 V 50 Hz, LEWA Licensing, LEC Connection Approval, and NRS Grid Code Practice
requirement_topic.zh: BESS并网——莱索托220/380 V 50 Hz、LEWA许可、LEC并网批准及NRS电网规范规程
requirement_topic.zht: BESS併網——賴索托220/380 V 50 Hz、LEWA許可、LEC併網批准及NRS電網規範規程

summary.en: Lesotho's electricity sector is regulated by LEWA (Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority), established under the Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority Act 2002. LEC (Lesotho Electricity Company) is the state-owned transmission and distribution utility. All grid-connected BESS installations require LEWA licensing approval and LEC grid-connection approval before commissioning. Lesotho's grid operates at 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) at 50 Hz — identical nominal voltage and frequency to China's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid. This base-parameter match means Chinese BESS power conversion systems (PCS) are already calibrated for the correct nominal voltage and frequency without hardware reconfiguration. However, protection relay settings, anti-islanding functions, fault-ride-through parameters, and SCADA communication interfaces must conform to LEC's technical requirements. Lesotho's electricity infrastructure relies heavily on South African engineering frameworks, and NRS (National Rationalized Specifications) standards — the South African grid-connection technical codes, including NRS 097 for distributed generation — may be referenced or required by LEC for BESS interconnection. IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards are the internationally expected technical reference for BESS grid connection. A publicly accessible LEC technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection requirements must be obtained directly from LEC and LEWA.
summary.zh: 莱索托电力行业由LEWA（莱索托电力和水务管理局）依据2002年《莱索托电力和水务管理局法》进行监管。LEC（莱索托电力公司）是国有输配电公用事业公司。所有并网BESS装置在投入使用前均须取得LEWA许可批准和LEC并网批准。莱索托电网以220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）50 Hz运行——与中国220/380 V 50 Hz电网的名义电压和频率完全相同。这一基础参数匹配意味着中国BESS储能变流器（PCS）已针对正确的名义电压和频率进行校准，无需硬件重新配置。然而，保护继电器设定、防孤岛功能、故障穿越参数和SCADA通信接口须符合LEC的技术要求。莱索托电力基础设施严重依赖南非工程框架，LEC可能对BESS并网引用或要求NRS（南非国家合理化规范）标准——包括分布式发电NRS 097。IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准是BESS并网的国际预期技术参考。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认LEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网要求须直接向LEC和LEWA获取。
summary.zht: 賴索托電力行業由LEWA（賴索托電力和水務管理局）依據2002年《賴索托電力和水務管理局法》進行監管。LEC（賴索托電力公司）是國有輸配電公用事業公司。所有併網BESS裝置在投入使用前均須取得LEWA許可批准和LEC併網批准。賴索托電網以220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）50 Hz運行——與中國220/380 V 50 Hz電網的名義電壓和頻率完全相同。這一基礎參數匹配意味著中國BESS儲能變流器（PCS）已針對正確的名義電壓和頻率進行校準，無需硬體重新配置。然而，保護繼電器設定、防孤島功能、故障穿越參數和SCADA通訊接口須符合LEC的技術要求。賴索托電力基礎設施嚴重依賴南非工程框架，LEC可能對BESS併網引用或要求NRS（南非國家合理化規範）標準——包括分佈式發電NRS 097。IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準是BESS併網的國際預期技術參考。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認LEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網要求須直接向LEC和LEWA獲取。

standards_or_laws: Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority Act 2002 — establishes LEWA as the regulator for electricity supply and water services in Lesotho
LEWA — Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority (licensing authority for electricity generation, transmission, and distribution including grid-connected storage)
LEC — Lesotho Electricity Company (state-owned utility; grid-connection approval required for all BESS interconnection)
NRS 097-2-1 — Grid Interconnection of Embedded Generation: Small-scale embedded generation (South African NRS standard likely referenced by LEC for distributed storage grid connection)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems

IEC 63056 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems (system-level safety)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V — identical in nominal voltage and frequency to Lesotho. While this base-parameter match is a genuine advantage (PCS voltage and frequency calibration requires no hardware change), China's GB/T grid-connection certificates, protection relay settings, anti-islanding configurations, and NEA approvals do not substitute for LEC's connection approval and LEWA licensing. Protection relay parameters validated for China's grid must be reviewed and adjusted for LEC's technical specifications and any applicable NRS interconnection codes.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网以50 Hz、220/380 V运行——与莱索托名义电压和频率完全相同。虽然这一基础参数匹配是真正的优势（PCS电压和频率校准无需硬件变更），但中国的GB/T并网证书、保护继电器设定、防孤岛配置和NEA审批不能替代LEC并网批准和LEWA许可。针对中国电网验证的保护继电器参数须依据LEC技术规格及任何适用的NRS并网规范进行审查和调整。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網以50 Hz、220/380 V運行——與賴索托名義電壓和頻率完全相同。雖然這一基礎參數匹配是真正的優勢（PCS電壓和頻率校準無需硬體變更），但中國的GB/T併網證書、保護繼電器設定、防孤島配置和NEA審批不能替代LEC併網批准和LEWA許可。針對中國電網驗證的保護繼電器參數須依據LEC技術規格及任何適用的NRS併網規範進行審查和調整。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy LEC's grid-connection requirements or LEWA's licensing conditions. Base nominal voltage (220/380 V) and frequency (50 Hz) are identical between China and Lesotho — this is a genuine match that eliminates hardware voltage reconfiguration. Remaining gaps requiring attention: (a) LEWA licensing — a generation or storage licence from LEWA is required before any BESS installation commences commercial operation; engage LEWA at the earliest project stage; (b) LEC connection approval — LEC sets project-specific grid-connection technical requirements; confirm whether LEC references NRS 097-2-1 or other South African NRS codes as the applicable interconnection standard for BESS; (c) protection relay settings and anti-islanding — even with matching nominal voltage/frequency, protection relay thresholds, ride-through curves, and anti-islanding detection settings configured for China's grid must be reviewed and adjusted to meet LEC requirements; (d) IEC 62933 compliance — where project or LEC specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; (e) SCADA communication protocol — confirm LEC's required BESS monitoring communication protocol (IEC 61850, DNP3, or project-specific).
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足LEC并网要求或LEWA许可条件。中国与莱索托的名义电压（220/380 V）和频率（50 Hz）完全相同——这是真正的匹配，消除了硬件电压重新配置的需要。需注意的其他差距：（a）LEWA许可——BESS装置在开始商业运营前须取得LEWA颁发的发电或储能许可；应在项目最早阶段与LEWA接触；（b）LEC并网批准——LEC规定项目专属并网技术要求；确认LEC是否将NRS 097-2-1或其他南非NRS规范作为BESS适用并网标准；（c）保护继电器设定和防孤岛——即使名义电压/频率相符，针对中国电网配置的保护继电器阈值、穿越曲线和防孤岛检测设定仍须审查和调整以满足LEC要求；（d）IEC 62933合规——若项目或LEC规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；（e）SCADA通信协议——确认LEC对BESS监控所要求的通信协议（IEC 61850、DNP3或项目专属）。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足LEC併網要求或LEWA許可條件。中國與賴索托的名義電壓（220/380 V）和頻率（50 Hz）完全相同——這是真正的匹配，消除了硬體電壓重新配置的需要。需注意的其他差距：（a）LEWA許可——BESS裝置在開始商業運營前須取得LEWA頒發的發電或儲能許可；應在項目最早階段與LEWA接觸；（b）LEC併網批准——LEC規定項目專屬併網技術要求；確認LEC是否將NRS 097-2-1或其他南非NRS規範作為BESS適用併網標準；（c）保護繼電器設定和防孤島——即使名義電壓/頻率相符，針對中國電網配置的保護繼電器閾值、穿越曲線和防孤島檢測設定仍須審查和調整以滿足LEC要求；（d）IEC 62933合規——若項目或LEC規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；（e）SCADA通訊協議——確認LEC對BESS監控所要求的通訊協議（IEC 61850、DNP3或項目專屬）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — LEWA licensing and LEC grid-connection approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Lesotho; technical requirements are project-specific and must be confirmed directly with LEC and LEWA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Lesotho

source.publisher: LEWA — Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lesotho and China share the same nominal grid voltage (220/380 V) and frequency (50 Hz) — a genuine base-parameter match that eliminates PCS hardware voltage reconfiguration. However, Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy LEWA licensing or LEC grid-connection requirements. Protection relay settings, anti-islanding parameters, and SCADA communication interfaces must be reviewed against LEC and applicable NRS interconnection technical requirements. Engage LEWA and LEC at the earliest project stage to determine licensing conditions, connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications. No publicly accessible LEC technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莱索托与中国共享相同的名义电网电压（220/380 V）和频率（50 Hz）——这是真正的基础参数匹配，消除了PCS硬件电压重新配置的需要。然而，中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足LEWA许可或LEC并网要求。保护继电器设定、防孤岛参数和SCADA通信接口须依据LEC及适用NRS并网技术要求进行审查。应在项目最早阶段与LEWA和LEC接触，确定许可条件、并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认LEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 賴索托與中國共享相同的名義電網電壓（220/380 V）和頻率（50 Hz）——這是真正的基礎參數匹配，消除了PCS硬體電壓重新配置的需要。然而，中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足LEWA許可或LEC併網要求。保護繼電器設定、防孤島參數和SCADA通訊接口須依據LEC及適用NRS併網技術要求進行審查。應在項目最早階段與LEWA和LEC接觸，確定許可條件、併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認LEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格。
